display.name: Suspicious Merchant
display.short_description: A hooded peddler has set a handcart half off the road. His wares stay under wax cloth, and the smile he offers never reaches his eyes.

choices.label: Take the quiet trade
choices.summary: Accept the stoppered flask he slides under the cloth and move on before he thinks better of the bargain.

choices.label: Call out the false weights
choices.summary: Catch the trick in his scale, lean in hard, and come away with the road coins he was hiding in his sleeve.
